---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents:
    - notebooks
    - r-projects
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, description, categories]
  feed: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Every assignment and project below is rendered directly from its original
`.ipynb` (Python) or `.qmd`/`.R` (R) source — click through to see full code,
output and commentary. Use the category filters to jump straight to Python or
R work.
